items.explain: pwd prints the current working directory for this shell session.

items.prompt: A relative path is resolved against…
items.explain: Relative paths join to the current working directory (cwd).

items.prompt: The browser vfs-terminal lab writes permanently to your real disk.
items.explain: It is a sandboxed concept lab — no real disk writes.

items.prompt: A good first practice trio in this module is…
items.explain: Navigation literacy starts with pwd, ls, and cd.
